detect-ai-patterns.notes: Persistent paragraph miscounting by devstral-small (outputs 5 instead of 4). Structure criterion scores 0.75 (3/4 tests pass). All other criteria score 1.0. Multiple instruction variations attempted but model has consistent counting bias.

rewrite-ai-text.notes: Fixed in iteration 2 by adding word counting guidance and JSON-as-string rule. summary-correct went from 0.667 to 1.0 (original_word_count was 149, corrected to accurate range).

changes_made.description: Complete SKILL.md rewrite: removed Python script references (not usable by agent), added explicit accuracy rules for paragraph counting, word counting, and JSON string writing. Added comprehensive pattern replacement tables with plain-language alternatives. Streamlined for smaller model.
Strengthened paragraph counting guidance: added explicit note about trailing blank lines, common off-by-one error warning, and verification step.
Made paragraph counting even more explicit with concrete example and directive to list each paragraph's opening words.
Replaced prose instructions with algorithmic paragraph counting steps (split on double-newline, filter empty, count). Added worked example showing trailing newline does not add a paragraph.
